Table.Name: veto_definer:table
Table.Stream: 1,"Missing H1 calibrated h(t) data",0,0,"H1","DCS-MISSING_H1_HOFT_C00",1,0,1366556418,1, 1,"Missing L1 calibrated h(t) data",0,0,"L1","DCS-MISSING_L1_HOFT_C00",2,0,1366556418,1, 1,"Stochastic hardware injections",0,0,"H1","DMT-INJECTION_STOCHASTIC",3,0,1366556418,1, 1,"Stochastic hardware injections",0,0,"L1","DMT-INJECTION_STOCHASTIC",4,0,1366556418,1, 1,"DetChar hardware injections",0,0,"H1","DMT-INJECTION_DETCHAR",5,0,1366556418,1, 1,"DetChar hardware injections",0,0,"L1","DMT-INJECTION_DETCHAR",6,0,1366556418,1, 1,"Ring-up of PI mode 29, located near 80 kHz",0,1404196636,"H1","DCH-80KHZ_PI_MODE_29_HIGH",7,0,1369771903,1, 1,"segments when DMT-OBS_INTENT not defined May 10",0,1367798418,"H1","DCH-OBS_INCORRECTLY_DEFINED",8,0,1367712018,1, 1,"segments when DMT-OBS_INTENT not defined May 11",0,1367884818,"L1","DCH-OBS_INCORRECTLY_DEFINED",9,0,1367798418,1, 1,"Times where the calibration lines are not correctly subtracted by the subtraction pipeline",0,1422118818,"H1","DCH-CAL_LINES_NOT_SUBTRACTED",10,0,1370044818,1, 1,"Ring-up of PI mode 5 located near 24 kHz",0,1377262472,"L1","DCH-20KHZ_PI_MODE_5_HIGH",11,0,1377262287,2, 1,"ADF servo caused an issue with squeezer performance",0,1387490418,"H1","DCH-SQZ_ERROR_ADF_SERVO",12,0,1387487358,1, 1,"Violin mode ring-ups affected time-dependent calibration parameters",0,1388233982,"L1","DCH-CALIBRATION_ERROR_FROM_VIOLINMODES",13,0,1388233979,1, 1,"Violin mode ringup disturbed DARM and caused lockloss",0,1387905096,"L1","DCH-VIOLIN_MODE6_RINGUP_TO_LOCKLOSS_DEC29",14,0,1387905075,1, 1,"Rapid turn on of calibration line subtraction biased estimates of the PSD",0,1383937225,"L1","DCH-CALIBRATION_LINE_SUBTRACTION_ERROR_NOV13",15,0,1383936925,1, 1,"Extreme violin mode ring ups causing non-linear noise artifacts on Jan 2 2024",0,1388233982,"L1","DCH-VIOLIN_MODE_RINGUP_JAN2",16,0,1388233638,2, 1,"Broadband excess noise right after two locking periods due to line subtraction problems.",0,1399180518,"H1","DCH-BROADBAND_LINE_SUBTRACTION_NOISE_MAY7_MAY8",17,0,1399083266,1, 1,"Local earthquake near LHO that cause extreme scattering for multiple minutes",0,1397622318,"H1","DCH-LOCAL_EQ_20240420",18,0,1397621958,1, 1,"Sporadic data dropouts that caused the line subtraction to fail for short periods in May 2024",0,1400938049,"L1","DCH-CAL_LINE_DATA_DROPOUTS",19,0,1399749384,2, 1,"Broadband low frequency noise from 10 to 100 hz",0,1404134569,"H1","DCH-BROADBAND_LOW_FREQ_NOISE_10_100HZ_JULY4",20,0,1404132468,1, 1,"L1 lost lock due to a slow ringup of ETMX. From this ringup, there is broadband excess noise right before lock is lost.",0,1397282131,"L1","DCH-ETMX_VIOLIN_MODE_RINGUP_APR16",21,0,1397281038,1, 1,"There was some saturation of photodiodes on ETMX due to some tuning of the violin mode damping.",0,1397396418,"L1","DCH-PD_SATURATION_FROM_VIOLIN_DAMPING_APR17",22,0,1397395716,1, 1,"Issues with the SQZ OPO at LIGO Hanford causing severe degregation of the range",0,1400246431,"H1","DCH-SQZ_OPO_ISSUE_20240520",23,0,1400242458,1, 1,"Remove 4 seconds at the end of each lock stretch",0,0,"H1","DMT-PRE_LOCKLOSS_4",24,0,1394982018,1, 1,"Remove 4 seconds at the end of each lock stretch",0,0,"L1","DMT-PRE_LOCKLOSS_4",25,0,1394982018,1, 1,"Removing 80 Khz PI mode ringup from July 16 through Sept18",0,1410652818,"H1","DCH-PI_80KHZ_MODE_JULY16_SEPT18",26,0,1405123218,1, 1,"10 Khz PI mode ringups",0,1411344018,"H1","DCH-PI_10KHZ_MODE_COMPUTE_100",27,0,1410566418,1, 1,"Excess noise due to power issues with PCALY",0,1407989478,"L1","DCH-PCALY_NOISE_10HZ_100HZ_AUG18",28,0,1407984618,1, 1,"Loud glitching near 60 Hz due to loose SQZ DQ_CAT1_SATURATION_B1p_PD2_OFFLINE",0,1422118818,"V1","DQ_CAT1_SATURATION_B1P_PD2_OFFLINE_O4",42,0,1396796418,1, 1,"Loud, broadband glitching in December at H1 with no known origin; TCS channel was noted to be a valuable witness",0,1417948638,"H1","DCH-DEC_2024_BROADBAND_TCS_WITNESS",43,0,1417148238,1, 1,"Loud, broadband noise during active times; part of mystery glitching mentioned in H1 alog 81811",0,1418106078,"H1","DCH-SQZ_GLITCH_10_100_HZ_13_DEC",44,0,1418105058,1, 1,"Loud, broadband noise in higher frequencies that corresponds to SQZ behavior at the start of lock",0,1422098778,"H1","DCH-SQZ_HIGH_FREQ_JAN",45,0,1421094078,1, 1,"Fire drill at L1 which caused a brief moment of high frequency noise",0,1414332558,"L1","DCH-FIRE_DRILL_HF_OCT_30",46,0,1414332258,1, 1,"Sharp feature from 10 to 40 hz that causes loud glitches",0,1414641318,"L1","DCH-SHARP_FEATURE_10_40_HZ_NOV_3",47,0,1414640778,1, 1,"Short jumps in BNS range due to OPO temp changes",0,1412778798,"H1","DCH-BROADBAND_SPECTRUM_CHANGE_OPO_TEMP",48,0,1412692518,1, 1,"Several locklosses on this day, mostly noted to be due to the rising microseism and FSS glitching.",0,1414640658,"H1","DCH-RANGE_DECAY_BROADBAND_NOISE",49,0,1414639698,1, 1,"The jump in the range is due to a change in the SQZ phase.",0,1416330018,"L1","DCH-SQZ_PHASE_ADJUSTMENT_NOV_22",50,0,1416329778,1, 1,"L1 experience extreme amounts of scattering due to microseism glitching",0,1417967238,"L1","DCH-HIGH_MICRO_NOISE_DEC11",51,0,1417940838,1, 1,"Periods where the line subtraction turns on suddenly modes",0,1412591690,"H1","DCH-EXCESSIVE_VIOLIN_RINGDOWN",53,0,1411650716,1, 1,"20 and 30 hz noise flagged by stochmon",0,1423547058,"L1","DCH-STOCHMON_RUNGUP_20_30_HZ",54,0,1418998698,1, 1,"Broadband
